The recipe title reads 'maple-glazed APPLE-CHICKEN SAUSAGE BITES'.
The book is resting on a granite countertop.

ocr: 1 12- to 16-ounce package cooked apple-flavor chicken sausage links
1 Preheat oven to 375°F. Cut sausage into 1-inch slices. Place in a shallow baking pan. For maple glaze, in a small bowl combine maple syrup, mustard, and sage.
2 Bake sausage for 8 minutes. Brush generously with maple glaze. Bake about 8 minutes more or until sausage is glazed and thoroughly heated through, stirring once.
3 Use pretzel sticks as edible toothpicks to serve sausage slices.
Nutrition facts per appetizer: 88 cal., 2 g total fat (1 g sat. fat), 185 mg sodium, 14 g carb., 0 g fiber, 11 g sugar, 4 g protein.
